message:
feat(docs,test): expand divergence taxonomy artifact schema and add broker/taxonomy contract tests

docs/lab_live_divergence_taxonomy.md:
- Specify differential_failures.json required fields: failure_artifacts,
  runtime_kind, normalized_record_path, artifact_path, repro_command,
  crashpack_link
- Specify differential_repro_manifest.json required fields: summary_path,
  deviations_path, failure_artifacts_path, lab/live_normalized_path,
  repro_commands, promoted_scenario_id

tests/lab_live_verification_taxonomy_contract.rs:
- Extend divergence registry token check with failure_artifacts,
  normalized_record_path, crashpack_link, repro_commands,
  promoted_scenario_id

tests/wasm_service_worker_broker_contract.rs:
- browser_package_fail_closes_foreign_requested_lane_in_durable_broker_records:
  verify both parser functions check requestedLane against
  BROWSER_SERVICE_WORKER_BROKER_LANE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -316,6 +316,27 @@ same stable file set used by the broader differential program:
 - `lab_normalized.json`
 - `live_normalized.json`
 
+`differential_failures.json` is the runtime-artifact index for the divergence
+and must retain, per side:
+
+- `failure_artifacts`
+- `runtime_kind`
+- `normalized_record_path`
+- `artifact_path`
+- `repro_command`
+- `crashpack_link` when the retained artifact is a crashpack
+
+`differential_repro_manifest.json` is the replay/minimization control plane for
+the bundle and must retain at least:
+
+- `summary_path`
+- `deviations_path`
+- `failure_artifacts_path`
+- `lab_normalized_path`
+- `live_normalized_path`
+- `repro_commands`
+- `promoted_scenario_id` when the case has already become a durable regression
+
 ### Lifecycle and Promotion Rules
 
 `regression_promotion_state` must follow an explicit lifecycle instead of ad-hoc
